headline: Chevron Iran Warning Puts Hormuz Risks And Valuation Gap In Focus
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) CEO has warned that oil traders are underestimating the impact of the Iran crisis and potential Strait of Hormuz closure on global oil supplies. The warning centers on physical supply disruptions that are not fully reflected in current oil futures pricing. The Strait of Hormuz is a key chokepoint for global crude flows, so any prolonged disruption could affect supply chains and pricing for a broad range of energy products. For you as an investor, Chevron sits near the...
